creator: avatar@www.mmlab.cse.yzu.edu.tw
text:
Some sound related ioctl calls submitted in PR/7792 was not committed to
-current(already folded into -stable).

Fix: Attached is the patch against -current(linux_ioctl.c 1.29 & linux.h 1.23).
Please check and apply it, thanks.
	
How-To-Repeat: Just take a look at /sys/i386/linux/linux_ioctl.c 1.11.2.7 & 1.29, about the
LINUX_SNDCTL_SEQ_XXX, LINUX_SNDCTL_SYNTH_XXX....
